name: cartographic-agentic-contexting-example-repo
description: Small Node.js monorepo sample with scoped API, web, database, observability, billing, and UI contexts.

scripts.check: node --check apps/api/src/server.js && node --check apps/api/src/http.js && node --check apps/api/src/auth/passwords.js && node --check apps/api/src/auth/sessions.js && node --check apps/api/src/auth/routes.js && node --check apps/api/src/billing/catalog.js && node --check apps/api/src/billing/routes.js && node --check packages/db/store.js && node --check packages/observability/logger.js
